title: wedelia africana var. guineensis
intro: Wedelia africana var. guineensis, also known as the Guinea flower or Wedelia, is a plant species that belongs to the family Asteraceae. It is traditionally used in folk medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antifungal properties. The health benefits of Wedelia africana var. guineensis include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate pain, and treat various skin conditions such as eczema and acne. Herbal preparations of the plant include infusions, decoctions, and topical applications, which are used to treat various ailments and promote overall well-being.
